'''wathazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ight|ight]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ight|ight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wathazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæthæzhæth|wæthæzhæth]] || [[word:wæthæzhæj|wæthæzhæj]] || [[word:wæthæzhæsh|wæthæzhæsh]] || [[word:wæthæzhæ|wæthæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wathathazhath|wathathazhath]] || [[word:wathathazhaj|wathathazhaj]] || [[word:wathathazhash|wathathazhash]] || [[word:wathathazha|wathathazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wathazhath|wathazhath]] || [[word:wathazhaj|wathazhaj]] || [[word:wathazhash|wathazhash]] || [[word:wathazha|wathazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wathafzhafth|wathafzhafth]] || [[word:wathafzhafj|wathafzhafj]] || [[word:wathafzhafsh|wathafzhafsh]] || [[word:wathafzhaf|wathafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wathazhatha|wathazhatha]] || [[word:wathazhaja|wathazhaja]] || [[word:wathazhasha|wathazhasha]] || [[word:wathazhaka|wathazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wathazhath|wathazhath]] || [[word:wathazhaj|wathazhaj]] || [[word:wathazhash|wathazhash]] || [[word:wathazha|wathazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wathazhathal|wathazhathal]] || [[word:wathazhajal|wathazhajal]] || [[word:wathazhashal|wathazhashal]] || [[word:wathazhakal|wathazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wathazhaathatha|wathazhaathatha]] || [[word:wathazhaajaja|wathazhaajaja]] || [[word:wathazhaashasha|wathazhaashasha]] || [[word:wathazhaaka|wathazhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wathazhathan|wathazhathan]] || [[word:wathazhajan|wathazhajan]] || [[word:wathazhashan|wathazhashan]] || [[word:wathazhakan|wathazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wathazhathaoro|wathazhathaoro]] || [[word:wathazhajaoro|wathazhajaoro]] || [[word:wathazhashaoro|wathazhashaoro]] || [[word:wathazhakaoro|wathazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
